_publications._publicationTitle: Notch signaling via Hey1 and Id2b regulates Müller glia's regenerative response to retinal injury.

_contextSnippet: In developing fish, mCherry and GFP immunofluorescence indicate Notch signaling is activated and restricted to differentiating MG within the first 2 days post-fertilization (dpf), preceding gfap:GFP transgene induction
details: mCherry immunofluorescence indicates Notch signaling is activated and restricted to differentiating MG within the first 2 days post-fertilization (dpf), preceding gfap:GFP transgene induction
